case_title: NIMER MASSIS RESPONDENT VS. JEFF ROSEN et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-07-2003 IN DEPT. 504 - ORDERED ASSIGNED TO 504 FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF NIMER MASSIS AND AGAINST AVENUE 9 FOR $1,298.95, $83.00 COSTS AND $100.00 ATTORNEYS FEES. NIMER MASSIS TO TAKE NOTHING AS TO INDIVIDUAL JEFF ROSEN. EXHIBITS RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED (504)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MASSIS, NIMER RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SUCCOTASH $1,298.95 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,481.95, - AMENDED JUDGMENT TO REFLECT APPELLANT/DEFENDANT AS NIMANO EATS, INC., DBA SUCCOTASH.
